'''dachoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nickelling|nickelling]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ch-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nickelling|nickelling]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dachoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæchereth|dæchereth]] || [[word:dæcherej|dæcherej]] || [[word:dæcheresh|dæcheresh]] || [[word:dæchere|dæchere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dachochoroth|dachochoroth]] || [[word:dachochoroj|dachochoroj]] || [[word:dachochorosh|dachochorosh]] || [[word:dachochoro|dachochoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dachoroth|dachoroth]] || [[word:dachoroj|dachoroj]] || [[word:dachorosh|dachorosh]] || [[word:dachoro|dachoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dachofroth|dachofroth]] || [[word:dachofroj|dachofroj]] || [[word:dachofrosh|dachofrosh]] || [[word:dachofrof|dachofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dachorotho|dachorotho]] || [[word:dachorojo|dachorojo]] || [[word:dachorosho|dachorosho]] || [[word:dachoroko|dachoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dachoroth|dachoroth]] || [[word:dachoroj|dachoroj]] || [[word:dachorosh|dachorosh]] || [[word:dachoro|dachoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dachorothol|dachorothol]] || [[word:dachorojol|dachorojol]] || [[word:dachoroshol|dachoroshol]] || [[word:dachorokol|dachorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dachorothotho|dachorothotho]] || [[word:dachorojojo|dachorojojo]] || [[word:dachoroshosho|dachoroshosho]] || [[word:dachoroko|dachoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dachorothon|dachorothon]] || [[word:dachorojon|dachorojon]] || [[word:dachoroshon|dachoroshon]] || [[word:dachorokon|dachorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dachorothoro|dachorothoro]] || [[word:dachorojoro|dachorojoro]] || [[word:dachoroshoro|dachoroshoro]] || [[word:dachorokoro|dachorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
